name: 25 MG Indomethacin Extended-Release Capsules USP
about: 25 MG Indomethacin Extended-Release Capsules USP is a general medicine that comes in the form of capsules. These capsules are manufactured in India and are prescribed by doctors based on the patients condition. The dosage of the medicine is 25mg, and it should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The extended-release feature of the capsules ensures that the medicine is released gradually over a period of time, providing long-lasting relief to the patient. The medicine is used to treat pain and inflammation caused by various conditions such as arthritis, gout, or ankylosing spondylitis. The medicine should be stored in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness.
